runtime_note: Scheduled automation runs may not expose a direct peer-trigger API. Teams coordinate only through durable, deduplicated repository requests and never treat a request as evidence of peer execution.

requests.reason: Apply R-005 temporal validity after structural, provenance, cryptographic, and trusted-builder checks for deployment and runtime evidence.
requests.requested_artifact: claim-class freshness policy integration or bounded handoff

requests.reason: Apply R-005 temporal validity to Cloudflare deployment evidence without treating freshness as deployment truth.
requests.requested_artifact: workflow freshness gate or implementation-ready integration note

requests.reason: Index R-005 as a new epistemic distinction: provenance, trust, freshness, and truth remain separate claim dimensions.
requests.requested_artifact: continuity index record with contradiction and supersession links

requests.reason: Review whether any public preview or hosting evidence uses time-sensitive claims and adopt explicit validity bounds where applicable.
requests.requested_artifact: public-evidence freshness boundary note or no-applicability finding

requests.reason: Apply R-030 JOSE header and key-compatibility validation before trusting any GitHub OIDC-authenticated deployment evidence.
requests.requested_artifact: OIDC verification composition note or test demonstrating header policy before signature and claim authorization

requests.reason: Compose R-029 fresh JWKS selection with R-030 JOSE header policy before cryptographic verification in Cloudflare deployment identity checks.
requests.requested_artifact: workflow verifier integration test or implementation-ready composition spec

requests.reason: Index the distinction between key freshness, JOSE policy compatibility, signature validity, claim validity, and authorization.
requests.requested_artifact: continuity record linking R-029 and R-030 without collapsing their claim states

requests.reason: Review any future OIDC-backed hosting proof against the R-030 rule; no action is required when the independent surface does not consume OIDC evidence.
requests.requested_artifact: OIDC applicability finding or bounded verifier handoff
